label: Editable decision assumptions
note: Salary offers, living costs, relocation costs and personal value scores are explicit user inputs. They are never inferred silently.

label: Elsewhere deterministic world-state model
note: Monthly savings, shock costs, divergence and decision scores are computed in TypeScript and covered by tests.

label: France 2026 progressive income-tax bands
note: Official 2026 bands: 0% to €11,600; 11% to €29,579; 30% to €84,577; 41% to €181,917; 45% above. Demo assumes one tax part.

label: UK 2026–27 Income Tax rates and allowances
note: Official personal allowance and England/Wales/Northern Ireland tax bands, including allowance taper above £100,000.

label: UK 2026–27 employee National Insurance
note: Category A employee rate: 8% between annualized primary and upper thresholds and 2% above.

label: ECB EUR/GBP reference rate
note: 16 July 2026 reference: €1 = £0.84873. Used only to normalize the comparison into euros.

label: ONS average London private rent, May 2026
note: Across London, average monthly private rent was £2,294 in May 2026.

label: APUR/OLAP average Paris private rent
note: Average private-sector rent in Paris was €1,307 per month at 1 January 2025; new movers averaged €28.30/m².
